message:
feat: add session and access control system

- First login is admin with no auth required
- Admin can set up password or passkey authentication
- Role-based access: admin, editor (write), viewer (read-only)
- Share links with editor/viewer tokens
- Sessions with separate terminal tabs per session
- Binary protocol for auth messages (0x90-0x9F)
- Access Control dialog in admin menu
- Tokens stored in ~/.termweb/auth.json
